text:
Tissue Injury @ SOC ROC This field indicates the current number of unstageable unhealed pressure ulcers due to suspected deep tissue
injury that were present on admission (most recent SOC / ROC). CHAR 2 x
M1310_PRSR_ULCR_LNGTH M1310 Largest Pressure Ulcer Length This field records the longest length (in centimeters) "head-to-toe" of the Stage III or IV pressure ulcer with the
largest surface dimension (length x width). CHAR 4 x
M1312_PRSR_ULCR_WDTH M1312 Largest Pressure Ulcer Width This
